schemas.name: Virtual Auditor

mainEntity.name: How much does company registration cost in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 for Pvt Ltd. Covers: DSC, DIN, name approval, SPICe+, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. Government stamp duty included.
RoC Bangalore, located at Kendriya Sadan, 2nd Floor, Koramangala, Bangalore 560034. Virtual Auditor's Bangalore office coordinates with this RoC for all filings.

mainEntity.name: Do you have a physical office in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore, Karnataka 560001. Walk-in consultations available by appointment. Call +91 95139 39333 to schedule.

mainEntity.name: How long does registration take in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-15 working days. Bangalore-specific factors: MCA portal processing is national (not city-dependent), but local notarization, stamp duty, and address verification may vary.

mainEntity.name: Can I register an LLP in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. LLP registration from ₹10,000. Filed with the Central Registration Centre (CRC). Post-registration compliance handled by our Bangalore office.
Yes. Annual filings, statutory audit, GST, TDS, board resolutions, and FEMA/FDI compliance (if you raise foreign investment) — all from our Bangalore office.
